blocks.content: Crack. Crack.
Hearing the sound of insects being crushed, Shirone slowly lifted his head.
Fermi was walking towards him with his hands in his pockets. His face, twisted into a smile, had already turned more than half into a skull.
As he chewed on the insects in his mouth and spat out the shells, the students watching through the vision grimaced.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Ugh!
Even seeing it on the screen was hard to stomach.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Fermi is no pushover either.
At Olivia's words, Collie nodded.
Yes. Last year, he made it to Stage 5 and became the final survivor. But with Shirone here this time, I can't guarantee the outcome.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Hmm...
Olivia's gaze remained cold.
She knew Fermi had colluded in ways unrelated to graduation. However, without evidence, she couldn't confront him.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: He"s definitely a deviant.
If recognizing an apple as an apple is normal, recognizing an apple as a strawberry is the deviant's perception.
Cognitive distortion to the point of denying reality.
If he wasn't an Immortal Function user like Shirone or an extreme ascetic like Gaold, he could only be seen as a twisted human from the start.
Smack!
Shirone's right eye burst, and disgusting maggots wriggled out.
Fermi watched calmly, chewing and spitting out insects.
Yet his throat continued to itch.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: This is certainly not a pleasant feeling.
Honestly, he hadn't expected Shirone to endure this long.
During his time in the senior class, Shirone was the first to follow him to the end of Stage 5.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: I thought it was nothing...
During the ghost incident, he was just a rookie. But in a year, he had grown tremendously to reach this point.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Shall we go a bit further...?
Fermi had never gone beyond Stage 5. He didn't care about winning or points, so stopping here was fine.
But it was different with Shirone.
Fermi couldn't rest until he removed any obstacles to his business by any means necessary.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: We won't settle this here. Let's move on. What's waiting for us next?
Spitting out another insect, Fermi spoke.
Shirone remained silent.
The moment his natural state wavered even slightly, his mind would be overturned like a stormy sea.
Smack!
Shirone's remaining eye burst. And with that, Stage 5, Insect King, ended.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Stage 6! Entering Extreme Heat!
The usually calm evaluation teacher, Collie's voice trembled with excitement and anxiety.
In his long teaching career, this was only the second time a student had reached this point.
The depth of enlightenment was unrelated to the level of magic or age.
But Extreme Heat was a dangerous realm even for ascetics.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Th-that is...
The students' eyes reflected the shadows of flames. In a world made entirely of fire, Shirone and Fermi faced each other.
Their clothes began to burn, and soon, fierce flames engulfed their bodies.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Ugh...
The sight of 3-meter-high flames completely consuming a person was enough to feel the heat without entering the Virtual Zone.
If pain is felt through nerves, fire directly stimulates the nerves, causing extreme pain.
The more horrifying fact was that this was a virtual world where the body was constantly reconstituted.
Whoosh! Whoosh!
Like candles on a candlestick, the two burned. Their expressions didn't change, but their minds screamed in agony.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is bad. This is really dangerous.
Shirone's face began to contort. Even with a mind of steel, it was hard to maintain composure.
What kind of life had Gaold lived to freely create such a hell?
But even those thoughts were swept away by the overwhelming pain.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Heh heh.
Fermi watched Shirone through the flames. Was he really trying to endure to the end against him?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Arrogant fool.
Stage 6 was tough for Fermi too. If he had known it would be this hard, he might have reconsidered.
That's why it's even more annoying.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: You're holding up well. This sauna isn't bad.
Shirone remained silent.
The moment his natural state wavered even slightly, his mind would be overturned like a stormy sea.
Smack!
Shirone's remaining eye burst. And with that, Stage 5, Insect King, ended.

blocks.speaker: Collie
